expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: Activate backup LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP to offload approximately 20% of traffic from the congested primary link R-NE-AGG-01 HundredGigE0/2/0/5 interface, reducing utilization below 80% and mitigating latency SLA breach.

business_case.justification: Reducing latency from 42.8ms to under 20ms prevents SLA penalties and improves enterprise customer retention.

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.

predicted_params.reason: Prevent further uplink traffic from impossible geolocation; mitigate potential cloning/replay attack.

expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Suspected device cloning / replay attack for dev-eui-1122334455667788
predicted_params.description: Device exhibited geolocation impossibility (uplinks observed in NY and LA within 4 seconds) and 300% uplink frequency anomaly, indicating possible cloning or replay attack. Immediate review recommended.

language_variants.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Core Router Firmware Upgrade - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Dear Customer, This is to inform you of a scheduled maintenance activity that may affect your services. Maintenance Window: May 28, 2024, 02:00 - 04:00 UTC. Affected Services: MPLS VPN, Dedicated Internet Access (DIA). Expected Impact: Intermittent packet loss and potential service interruption for high-availability circuits. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

language_variants.subject: REMINDER: Maintenance Scheduled in 24 Hours - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Reminder: Scheduled maintenance will begin in 24 hours. Please ensure your teams are prepared. Maintenance Window: May 28, 2024, 02:00 - 04:00 UTC.

language_variants.subject: MAINTENANCE STARTED: Core Router Upgrade - US-EAST-04

Maintenance Started: Core Router Upgrade in progress. Monitor dashboard for updates.
🔔 NOC ALERT: Core Router Firmware Upgrade STARTED - Cluster US-EAST-04. All NOC Tier 2 personnel please monitor BGP convergence and traffic rerouting.

audit.comment: Customer confirmed they did not request SIM swap and was at home all day. Fraudulent activity confirmed - scammer used fake identity at retail store. Blocking and rolling back immediately.

expected_params.reason: Fraudulent SIM swap confirmed. Customer verified identity and did not authorize swap. Restoring all services after successful rollback.

notes.message: Customer confirmed identity via voice verification. Customer stated they were at home all day and never visited Downtown retail store. SIM swap request was fraudulent - scammer used fake identity.

lessons_learned: Strengthen retail store identity verification process
Consider additional biometric verification for SIM swap requests
Customer responded quickly and mitigated potential financial loss
IP address matched known botnet - enhance network monitoring
